title: Lasso Red Teaming
description:
Autonomous Model & Application Scanning
Simulate real-world cyberattacks on your LLMs continuously, identifying hidden vulnerabilities before adversaries do.
Perform automated LLM security testing such as prompt injections, jailbreak attempts, and data poisoning tests to uncover security gaps.
Go beyond basic security testing with our advanced threat modeling capabilities- anticipate potential attacks, understand their impact, and implement effective countermeasures.
Model Cards- Lasso generates detailed model cards with categorized vulnerabilities, optimization recommendations, and remediation guidance. This helps organizations implement guardrails and maintain a strong security posture for their AI models and applications.
Strengthen your LLM defenses with actionable insights and prioritized remediation guidance.
Validate your GenAI security posture throughout the model lifecycle, from development to deployment and production.
